introSection: Dragon King(RYUOH) is a steel roller coaster located at Hokkaido Greenland in Iwamizawa, Hokkaido, Japan.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Between 2006 and 2009 the ride was painted its current colour scheme. Prior to this, it had blue track with white supports.

fullText:
Dragon King(RYUOH) is a steel roller coaster located at Hokkaido Greenland in Iwamizawa, Hokkaido, Japan.

Between 2006 and 2009 the ride was painted its current colour scheme. Prior to this, it had blue track with white supports.
